recommended_workflow: Save this file in your repo root as securefight-defense-plan.json.
Give the bundle to your implementation agent (for example Claude) to apply selected changes.
Review generated git diff quickly, run tests, then push to your repository.

rounds.mitigation: Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent XSS attacks.

changes.title: Implement input validation and sanitization

rounds.mitigation: Implement CSRF protection mechanisms to prevent CSRF attacks.

changes.title: Implement CSRF token-based protection
Verify CSRF token on sensitive requests

rounds.mitigation: Implement X-Frame-Options and Content Security Policy (CSP) headers to prevent Clickjacking attacks.
Implement access control and input validation mechanisms to prevent IDOR attacks in the API module.

changes.title: Implement RBAC in the API module
Implement input validation in the API module

rounds.mitigation: Implement secure storage and handling of API keys to prevent leakage.

changes.title: Implement rate limiting on API endpoints
Implement monitoring on API endpoints

rounds.mitigation: Implement clickjacking protection mechanisms to prevent the web application from being embedded in a malicious website.

changes.title: Add X-Frame-Options header
changes.patch:
from django.http import HttpResponse

def index(request):
    response = HttpResponse("Welcome to the web application")
    response['X-Frame-Options'] = 'SAMEORIGIN'
    return response

rounds.mitigation: Implement access control and input validation mechanisms to prevent Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) attacks on the API module.

changes.title: Implement role-based access control
Validate and sanitize user input
Implement server-side authorization checks

rounds.mitigation: Implement secure API key management and rotation policies to prevent API key leakage in the API module.

changes.title: Implement API key rotation policy
Enforce principle of least privilege
